parameters.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM ingested_content WHERE status = 'pending';

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { message: 'No pending items', timestamp: new Date().toISOString() } }];

parameters.query: SELECT id, source_name, source_url, raw_title, raw_body, raw_image_url, language FROM ingested_content WHERE status = 'pending' ORDER BY ingested_at ASC LIMIT 5;
UPDATE ingested_content SET status = 'processing' WHERE id = $1 AND status = 'pending' RETURNING id, source_name, source_url, raw_title, raw_body, raw_image_url, language;
UPDATE ingested_content SET status = 'rejected', reject_reason = $2 WHERE id = $1;
UPDATE ingested_content SET status = 'published', cc_article_id = $2 WHERE id = $1;

parameters.jsCode:
const items = $input.all();
return [{ json: { message: 'Content publishing run complete', articles_created: items.length, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() } }];
